'''Golthan's Fortress''' was the military base maintained by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Bregius Golthan]] on the planet [[Voktunma]].The fortress was located in the mountainous foothills to the west of Voktunma's [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] and designed with tall spires and steeply sloped roofs. Golthan had a special audience chamber in the center of the fortress, entered through ornately carved doors.<ref name="bcb" />

It was guarded by a defense grid composed of a number of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] towers placed strategically in the surrounding forests. The fortress was protected from aerial assault by [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] and a sensitive turbolaser targeting system. Only one ship was allowed to fly under the shields each day, a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] with special clearance codes.<ref name="bcb" />

The fortress was heavily damaged in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] when a group of mercenaries known as the [[Black Curs]] infiltrated the base to rescue the smuggler [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]. They destroyed the shield generators and sensor arrays, allowing their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to strafe the base.<ref name="bcb" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:GolthansFortressPlan-Journal8.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A plan of Golthan's Fortress.]]
The design of this fortress was based on concept art prepared for [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="MTSB">''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>
